---
title: "Tidy data with tidyr"
---

```{=html}
<iframe class="slide-deck" src="slides/tidyr.html"></iframe>
```

[Slides in full screen](slides/tidyr.html){target="_blank"} | [Download PDF slides](slides_pdf/tidyr.pdf){download="tidyr.pdf"}

::: {.callout-tip}
## Exercises
Go to the [task page](tasks/tidyr.qmd) for the exercises.
:::

## Resources

- [Tidyr cheatsheet](https://rstudio.github.io/cheatsheets/tidyr.pdf)
